steps.title: Choose a possessive pronoun
steps.content: The blank comes before "compelling narrative," so it must be a possessive pronoun. The antecedent is the singular epic poem The Poem of the Cid, so the pronoun must be singular and possessive.

steps.title: Reject contractions and plurals
steps.content: A is the contraction "they are," not a possessive. C is plural possessive, but the antecedent is one poem. D is the contraction "it is," not the possessive form needed before "compelling narrative." The answer is B.
